com.intelix.service.GraphQLServices.utils

Class NumberToletter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.intelix.service.GraphQLServices.utils.NumberToletter

  • @Component
public class NumberToletter
extends java.lang.Object
    Clase util para convertir un BigDecimal a letras

    Ricardo J. Carvajal F.
